Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Vivian Lerche, Tel. No. 1-415-680-5731 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearance on the matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank's motion for order vacating dismissal and entering judgment is granted. No opposition filed.
Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098 =302/hk
